title: daemon/store: get_contacts(ids=Some) runs N queries sequentially — no batch
description: get_contacts(ids=Some(&[...]), ...) (store.rs line 1469) loops over each id and issues one SELECT per id with fetch_optional. If a JMAP ChatContact/get request contains 100 contact IDs, this issues 100 separate SQLite queries inside a loop. The None path uses a single query with LIMIT 1000. The same N+1 pattern exists in get_chats(ids=Some), get_messages(ids), and get_spaces(ids=Some). A batch IN(...) query (the same approach used in get_space_members_batch) would reduce N round-trips to 1. Trigger: JMAP ChatContact/get with large ids array. Bad behavior: O(N) DB round-trips where O(1) is possible.
